## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] I verified behavior manually where applicable

## Documentation Check

- [ ] I updated `README.md` for user-facing, workflow, or config changes
- [ ] Or, I intentionally did not update `README.md` and added the PR label `docs-not-needed`

## Risk & Rollback

- [ ] I identified the main risk areas for this change
- [ ] I can revert this safely if needed

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on.
